query:
UPDATE release_notes
SET summary = 'Points in Play now shows your full leaderboard total, including boost bonuses.',
    body = 'We corrected the My Day points display so it lines up with the leaderboard. No action is needed — your submitted results and bonuses are still counted.'
WHERE active = 1
  AND category = 'community_care'
  AND (title LIKE '%Points in Play%' OR summary LIKE '%Points in Play%' OR body LIKE '%Points in Play%')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 1;
command:

WHERE active = 1
  AND category = 'community_care'
  AND (title LIKE '%Points in Play%' OR summary LIKE '%Points in Play%' OR body LIKE '%Points in Play%')
